# Lsch

**Summary**: A strategy used to find the optimal step length by searching along a specific direction.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-zhang|Zhang, 2015]] compared LM+DE and LM+DE+LSCH to evaluate the necessity of line search when using DE-derived damping factors.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- LM+DE was found to be sufficient for determining step lengths in several cases, reducing the need for traditional line search. ([[2015-zhang|Zhang, 2015, p. 122]])
